text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp has officially kicked off! Vodka surveys the grand
sights and deeply breathes in the smell of the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, let's race! Whaddya say to a two-furlong sprint on the sand?
Think you can match my speed?

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text:
Hmph, who do you think I am? I'm already G1 material! Do you really
think you'd win against me?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely—with my brand-new "explosive running" technique! Watch
me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Raaargh! Look at the way I launch off the sand! Man, this technique's
so cool! I'm right behind my opponent!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
W-wait a second. Why is the gap getting bigger again?! Crap, I can't
close it! G1s are seriously in a whole 'nother league...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Daaammit! Why?! I could swear I had way more power!

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text: Heh, looks like this is the best you can do. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This sucks! Nah, you better watch me. By the time this camp is over,
I'm gonna be the king of this beach...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oh, crap, I'm doing it again. Trying to prove how cool I am is totally
backfiring on me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hm, what's up, Trainer? If you're here to try and make me feel
better—
choice_data_list: Try not to kick the sand out from behind you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Kicking the sand... Oh, you mean my "explosive running"
technique? But if I don't kick, then I can't get enough power...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hang on! I think I got it! Sand is different—if I keep kicking it, I'm actually gonna lose power instead. In that case, I should... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure there's a better way to run. Mom was super fast even on dirt,
but she was never flashy. I bet I can try to pull something like that off
too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I think I got it... Um, excuse me! Can we run it back? Please?

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what the?! What's with your speed?! You're like a totally different
person now!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is it! I just needed to lower my center of gravity and drive my feet
into the ground!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
From now on, this technique'll be called my "slashing style"! I just
need to concentrate all my power into my feet and push forward!
Raaargh!

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text: I... lost... to this complete amateur...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I did it! ...Hey, thanks for racing against me! You're seriously a tough
opponent.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's meet again... in the Twinkle Series. With your skills, I'm sure
you'll easily climb to the top.

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text: Vodka, you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The end of summer camp rolls around, and with it came the summer
festival. After the festivities, I find Vodka again.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Man, festivals are great. I sold tons, too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I ate a bit, but I was also super busy serving up food. I was helping
out at one of the yakisoba places.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Did ya know that I'm actually super good at making noodles? When I
was little, my pops's buddy let me help out at his street stall.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But that's beside the point, isn't it? Trainer, thanks for helpin' me out
during summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And as for the type of coolness that I wanna aim for—I think it finally
clicked. That beach race made me realize that it's okay to have both
types.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I can borrow from both my pops's coolness and my mom's
strength.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'll be the coolest runner who never loses! And when I win, that's when
I'll drop my cool one-liners! That way, I'll never come off as a sore
loser.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Of course, that's easier said than done, but I got this!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I got this baseless confidence from my pops. Oh, speaking of
which, my mom told me a story about him.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It was about his reckless confidence. Back before they started going
out...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pops confessed his love to Mom during the summer festival.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
At the time, Mom was a rising star and busy as any racer could ever
be. Pops, on the other hand, was your run-of-the-mill guy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Do you wanna guess why my mom agreed to date him?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorta, but not quite. Apparently, Pops started saying all kinds of
stuff. Like how he'd become famous, or how he'd make her the
happiest person alive.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: My mom thought it was funny how he talked himself up that much. He pretty much got her to say yes through sheer grit.
choice_data_list: The apple doesn't fall far from the tree, huh?
The apple doesn't fall far from the tree, huh?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I got my heart from my pops, and my legs from my mom.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
That's just who I am! And with both of these strengths combined, no
challenge is too great for me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Because I've gotten a hell of a lot stronger since meeting you!
choice_data_list: Did you also overcome your weakness?
Did you also overcome your weakness?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I used to get all flustered just hearin' love stories, but now
I'm totally fine... I think...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(Come to think of it... Mom said that after she agreed to date Pops,
they rode his motorcycle home together.)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
(Riding tandem, huh... What if I went back to the dorm with Trainer
like that?)

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh, you'll give me a ride? Hop on? O-okay... Don't mind if I do...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? Grab onto your waist? I-if you say so...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Bfgldskdf!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I-I'm totally fine. Th-this is 'cause, um...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Chocolate bananas! That's it! I ate too many chocolate bananas
earlier! Believe me, damn it!
